name: Hermes Sandbox
postCreateCommand: curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent/main/scripts/install.sh | bash && source ~/.bashrc && echo 'Hermes installed. Run: hermes setup'
postStartCommand: source ~/.bashrc && nohup hermes gateway > /tmp/hermes-gateway.log 2>&1 & echo 'Hermes gateway starting... check /tmp/hermes-gateway.log'
